sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45230" key="eu)sunh/goros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσυν-ήγορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skilled in advocacy</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.791</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
